description_long: This is a rectangular, upright filing cabinet constructed primarily from a light wood material, featuring a smooth, natural wood grain finish. The front face is fitted with two large glass doors, each divided into two panes, allowing visibility of the interior shelves. Inside, there are two horizontal shelves, creating three storage compartments for organizing files or documents. The sides and back are solid wood panels, with no visible handles or hardware, giving the cabinet a clean, minimalist appearance. The glass doors appear to be frameless, seamlessly integrated into the wooden structure. This cabinet is designed for indoor use and would typically be found in organized, professional environments.
description: A tall, light wood filing cabinet with two large glass doors and interior shelving, featuring a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet, showing a solid wood panel with a vertical wood grain pattern and no visible features.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying two large glass doors divided into four panes, revealing interior shelves for storage.
description_view_2: The right side of the cabinet, identical to the left, with a solid wood panel and no distinguishing features.
description_view_3: The back of the cabinet, consisting of a plain, uninterrupted wood panel with a consistent grain pattern.
